---
title: "test_pennyone_maturation_empire.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_pennyone_maturation_empire.ts"
loc: 35
complexity: 1
logic_score: 6.53
style_score: 6.76
intel_score: 8.86
overall_score: 8.12
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 6.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 7 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)

## ⛩️ API Gateways
- `[POST] /api/test/route`
- `[GET] /api/test/status`


## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [test](file://node:test)
- [describe](file://node:test)
- [*](file://node:assert)
- [getDb](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/intel/database.js)
- [savePing](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/intel/database.js)
- [getSessionsWithSummaries](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/intel/database.js)
- [getSessionPings](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/intel/database.js)
- [analyzeFile](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/analyzer.js)

### Exports
- `testRepo`
- `mockAgent`
- `sessions`
- `agentSession`
- `pings`
- `mockCode`
- `data`
